titles.title: Child in My Eyes (Always Be a Child)

verse.name: v1
verse.lines: I was there when you drew the breath of life And I could hear your voice The first time that you cried And though you couldn't see me I was very near And there's something now That I want you to hear

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: You will always be a child in my eyes And when you need some love My arms are open wide And even when you're growing old I hope you realize You will always be a child in my eyes

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: And I was there the first time that you prayed And I heard all the promises you made And when you fell before me Crying father I have sinned I picked you up And held you close again.
